hero.title: Services tailored to your business

business.title: Business websites
business.tagline: A business card that sells for you

eshop.description: E-commerce built on modern platforms focused on speed, conversion and simple management. Integrated with payment gateways, shipping carriers and accounting tools.

webapp.tagline: A digital tool built around your process
webapp.description: When a standard website isn't enough — booking systems, internal tools, dashboards, SaaS products. From prototype to production app.

landing.description: A high-converting microsite for a single product, campaign or event. Quickly launched, wired up to analytics and A/B testing.
landing.idealFor: Campaigns, product launches, ad click-through pages

redesign.tagline: Your old website deserves a second chance
redesign.description: Audit, new visual identity and technical overhaul of an existing site. I keep what works, fix what doesn't, and speed up what's slow.
redesign.idealFor: Companies with an older site that's losing conversions or looks dated

seo.title: SEO & performance
seo.description: Technical SEO, Core Web Vitals, structured data and performance optimisation. Measurable results tracked via Google Search Console and PageSpeed Insights.
seo.idealFor: Sites that load slowly or don't bring in organic traffic

meta.title: About — WebKosice
meta.description: I'm a freelance web developer based in Kosice. I design and build websites, e-shops and web applications.

hero.title: I'm a <accent>freelance web developer</accent> in Kosice
hero.lead: I've been building for the web for over 5 years — from simple presentation sites to complex web applications for companies across Slovakia. I work as a one-person studio: you deal directly with me, not an account manager.
hero.secondary: I believe a good website isn't about pretty visuals or fast code — it's about results. That's why every project starts with questions, not templates.

craft.title: Craftsmanship
craft.description: Every line of code is written with intent. No bloated, auto-generated JavaScript.

honesty.title: Straight talk
honesty.description: I'll tell you the truth — even when it's uncomfortable. Clear deadlines, clear pricing.

longterm.title: Long-term partnership
longterm.description: I don't do one-shot projects. I want your site to grow along with your business.

simple.title: Simplicity over complexity
simple.description: The best solution is the one that's just enough. Unnecessary tech is a liability.

about.stackSubtitle: The tools I use daily. Not all of them fit every project — I pick based on what makes sense for you.

timeline.question: How long does it take to build a website?
timeline.answer: A simple presentation site 2–4 weeks, a standard business site 4–6 weeks, an e-shop 6–10 weeks, a web app 8+ weeks. You get an exact timeline with the quote.

price.question: How much does a new website cost?
price.answer: It depends on the plan and scope. A basic site (Basic plan) starts from €99 one-time setup + from €15/month. A full business site (Standard plan) from €249 one-time + from €25/month. For e-shops and web applications, pricing is agreed individually based on your requirements. You always get a fixed quote upfront — no hidden costs.

ownership.question: Who owns the code and domain?
ownership.answer: You do. You get full access to the source code (GitHub/GitLab), hosting and domain. I never lock you in.

hosting.question: What about hosting?
hosting.answer: I recommend Vercel or Netlify for websites and a VPS for heavier applications. I'll advise on the cheapest sensible option, set it up, and you pay the provider directly.

support.question: What happens after launch?
support.answer: I stick around. I offer monthly care packages or bill hourly for smaller changes. I never leave you hanging.

cms.question: Can I edit the site myself?
cms.answer: Yes. For business sites I use a simple CMS (e.g. Sanity or Payload) so you can update text and images without touching code. I walk you through it personally.
